subject: [PATCH v2 021/110] bfs: use PRIino format for i_ino

2026-03-02.patch_summary: This patch series converts the i_ino format strings in the BFS filesystem to use the PRIino format macro, preparing for the widening of i_ino via kino_t. The changes affect various functions in fs/bfs/dir.c, specifically bfs_readdir and bfs_unlink.
